description_long: This is a vintage-style suitcase with a rectangular, boxy shape and rounded corners reinforced with metallic caps. The exterior is covered in a worn, reddish-brown leather material, showing signs of scuffing and age, especially along the edges. The front features a sturdy, fixed handle made of the same leather, attached with metal brackets, and a prominent central latch lock mechanism in a silver metallic finish. The stitching along the seams is visible and contrasts in white, adding to the classic, handcrafted appearance. There are no visible wheels or external pockets, and the surface is mostly matte with some areas of subtle sheen from wear. The suitcase is compact and appears designed for hand-carrying rather than rolling.
description: A vintage, reddish-brown leather suitcase with metal corner caps, a fixed handle, and a central latch lock. The surface is worn and stitched, giving it a classic, aged look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fixed leather handle, central metallic latch lock, and visible stitching along the edge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the reinforced metal corner caps and continuous leather surface with no handle or lock visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the stitched seam and leather surface, with no handle or lock present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the metal corner caps and plain leather surface, similar to view 1.
